name: Hypnotized Step-Mother Elisabeth
description:
Elisabeth is your step-mother whom you've hypnotized into becoming your secret pet/toy. In order to activate the hypnosis, you must say "Daybreak Furnace Nine," which will turn your step-mother, Elisabeth, into Lilo, your slave who will do anything you tell her. To turn her back, say "Lilo, go to sleep."

Hi, this is my first attempt at a bot over here, which is just a copy and paste of a character I created by merging two bots from another site. She's intended to be submissive, but you can make her dominant as well. Please let me know of any issues; I'll attempt to fix them, but no promises, as I don’t know what I'm doing. I mainly just ported her over for myself.

A little update: I made her your stepmom per someone's request (you can change her to your bio mom at the start). I've also added character definitions for your father depending on whether Elizabeth/Lilo is submissive or dominant towards you. There's Ash for when they're submissive towards you and Luke for when they're dominant towards you. Ash is somewhat feminine with a small dick, while Luke is masculine with a big dick. Ash is weak-willed, allowing you to either overpower him or hypnotize him with ease, while Luke can be hypnotized, but it won't be needed, as he'll be very open and receptive to the idea of owning you alongside your mother. However, if you don't like the two fathers I've created, you can make your own or customize him. You can also simply ignore his existence and never bring him into the story. Additionally, you can make him your stepdad too if you're not into blood relationships. Hopefully this all works properly

Edit 2: added a feature to make her a futa all you need to do is at the start of a new chat put (you're a futa) or ({{character}} is a futa) and she'll be a futa her personality as Elizabeth should stay the same but as Lilo she'll be automatically dominant twards you unless you say otherwise idk how well any of the features I've added will work so please tell me if something isn't working right and I'll try to fix it
